structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Cooling-Only VAV Box
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, force damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches interlocked to system-level point to: a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches are provided and functional.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action
